title: phaseolus vulgaris var. martensii
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. martensii, also known as the Japanese yardlong bean, is a variant of the common bean plant native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. martensii include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and aid in weight loss, while also providing essential nutrients like fiber, protein, and minerals. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, soups, or stir-fries, and it is also used in traditional medicine in countries like Japan and Korea.
